fullText:
The power of AI agents comes from:
1. intelligence of the underlying model
2. how much access you give it to all your data
3. how much freedom & power you give it to act on your behalf

I think for 2 & 3, security is the biggest problem. And very soon, if not already, security

Added conversation bubbles to differentiate what I send and how the agent responds.

Markdown and code now render (next for code syntax highlighting).

Pretty awesome multi-agent chat experience. https://t.co/PmQQu0Kwx4
While I generally support social network bans for teenagers, what if someone created a social network that actually helped them? They'd be forbidden to use this too.

I put a great deal of effort into ensuring that summaries of my essays omit important points. I don't do this directly. I do it by trying to make the essays so concise that you can't cut much without serious loss.
